Hardware Component File

ESP_X83_Bosch8.1_V6

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ESP_X83_Bosch8.1_V6_20110127T154704.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 740
Receive ID 760
Functional Addr 01
Functional Name ABS
